description: DescribeConnectorProfilesRequest schema from Amazon AppFlow API

connectorProfileNames.description: The name of the connector profile. The name is unique for each ConnectorProfile in the AWS account.

connectorType.description: The type of connector, such as Salesforce, Marketo, and so on.

maxResults.description: Specifies the maximum number of items that should be returned in the result set. The default for maxResults is 20.

nextToken.description: The pagination token for next page of data.
